series_metadata.series_description: Files contain information on water grants for Toledo, Sandusky, Kelly's Island, Huron, Lorain, Cleveland, Fairport, Conneaut, Ashtabula, Columbia Co., Steubenville, Jefferson, Belmont, Washington, Middleport, and Cincinnati. Includes applications, contra

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: unless Federal or State guidelines dictate otherwise except in case of information concerning contracts and grants which retention period is following final activity (closeout) as required by law
